description:
Discover the Ionian Sea on this Lagoon 51 ''Errant Vagabond'' catamaran, based in Paleros, Lefkas, offering unforgettable multi-day tours around the Greek islands. 

The yacht features 6 double cabins and 4 bathrooms, providing plenty of space for comfort and relaxation. Guests are cared for by an experienced captain familiar with the area and a hostess who serves traditional Mediterranean cuisine. Onboard amenities include a tender with 30 hp, snorkeling equipment, a stand-up paddleboard, beach toys, fishing gear, an underwater scooter, a large tube, and waterskis, making every day full of fun and adventure.

Perfect for anyone looking for a comfortable and memorable sailing tour of the Ionian Sea.

amenities.label: Teak deck in the cockpit and in front

crew.name: George Panagiotopoulos
crew.bio:
George Panagiotopoulos is a highly experienced and dependable professional skipper with many successful seasons at sea across Greek waters. He has extensive knowledge of the Northern and Southern Ionian, the Cyclades, the Dodecanese and the Saronic Gulf, allowing him to design safe, well-balanced itineraries tailored to weather conditions and guest expectations. He has operated a wide range of sailing monohulls, catamarans and motor yachts up to 68ft, both in private and charter environments. His background includes multi-season command of a private motor yacht in the Ionian Sea, long-term collaborations with established charter companies, flotilla leadership, yacht deliveries within Greece and internationally, as well as vessel preparation and off-season maintenance. This breadth of experience has made him confident in handling different yacht types, guest profiles and cruising conditions with professionalism and calm decision-making. George holds a Greek Offshore Sailing License (I.O.P), Motorboat License, GMDSS Communications License and First Aid certification. He is known for his reliability, strong seamanship and ability to remain composed under pressure, always prioritizing safety, smooth operation and an enjoyable onboard atmosphere.
Deeply connected to the sea beyond his profession, he enjoys fishing, spearfishing, swimming, snorkeling, running and continuous learning — qualities that reflect his disciplined and balanced character both on and off duty.

crew.name: Anastasia Methenitou
crew.bio:
Anastasia is a Greek Private Chef and experienced Yacht Cook, born on the island of Poros and raised in a true maritime environment where both sailing and cooking became part of her everyday life. With more than 15 years of experience working onboard catamarans, monohull sailing and racing yachts, motor yachts up to 25m, she is confident in managing all galley operations, from provisioning and menu planning to tailoring each culinary experience according to guests’ preferences and dietary requirements. Her cuisine reflects her Mediterranean roots, with a strong focus on Greek, Italian and European flavors, while she is also comfortable with Asian cuisine and fully experienced in vegan and plant-based gastronomy. She holds specialized diplomas from the Culinary Centre of Athens in Yachts & Villas and Greek & Mediterranean Cuisine, along with further training in Italian pasta, traditional Greek pies and vegan pastry.
Beyond her yachting experience, Anastasia has worked as a Vegan Chef, as a Sous Chef in an Italian restaurant, and as an Airbnb Hostess & Private Dining Cook, organizing bespoke dining experiences in Poros and the Athens Riviera. She has also worked as a Food Tour Guide for private culinary tours in Athens and has extensive experience in event planning, arranging wedding catering and private celebrations.
She speaks fluent English and has a good command of Spanish. Professional, discreet and adaptable, she aims to deliver a warm, authentic Greek hospitality experience combined with high standards and attention to detail onboard.
